title: Segfault in table with generated column and foreign key
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0, c1, c2 AS(1), PRIMARY KEY(c0) FOREIGN KEY(c2) REFERENCES t0);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts4;
CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(c2, 0 BETWEEN '' AND c1 COLLATE BINARY, CASE '' WHEN c3 THEN 0 WHEN 0 THEN 0 WHEN '' THEN 0 WHEN 0 THEN c0 ELSE c1 END);
key_bug_features: Segfault with generated column and foreign key in table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c1 TEXT, c2 AS (c0 + 1), FOREIGN KEY(c2) REFERENCES t1(c0));
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER, c1 REAL, c2 TEXT, c3 INTEGER, UNIQUE(c0, c1));
UPDATE t1 SET c1 = (SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c0 = t1.c0);
